full_text:
Teng Dan 滕耽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Teng Dan (滕耽)was born in Beihai. A gentlemen of the same province as Liu Yao, had a fine reputation in Wu. Teng Dan was affiliated with Liu Yao and the Wu Kingdom. Teng Dan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
